components.description: Specification structure, requirement mapping, and language-data integrity.
Source encoding, lexical structure, comments, whitespace, and layout.
Grammar, CST, AST, names, scopes, and source compatibility.
Exact numbers, dimensions, units, temperatures, and type judgments.
Formulae, elements, charge, phase, substances, and species.
Material constructors, premises, compositions, and linear identity.
Vessels, inventories, operations, stages, and deterministic transitions.
Claims, assumptions, holes, proof contexts, and goal generation.
Kernel judgments, tactics, reaction rules, and derivations.
Catalogue bundles, empirical facts, evidence, and coverage.
Diagnostics, edits, editor services, and agent editing.
Validated artifacts, identities, serialization, digesting, and replay.
Complete result envelopes and reviewed experiment journeys.
